description: `[1 2] = 5` assigns to a bare list literal, not a place, raising the runtime's own `ol-not-a-place` (issue #113/#156), mirroring `not-a-place-runtime-literal.expected.json`'s number-literal case. `params.text` carries the FULL target surface text (`[1 2]`), per the full-target-text rule from issue #113/#156.
